data.name: Futanari Jigsaw Puzzle
data.detailed_description:
Complete Classic Jigsaw Puzzles featuring very raunchy depictions of Futanari.

Somehow these stunning images have been split apart into thousands of tiny pieces.
Can you restore them all to their former glory to behold their splendor?

Features

  • 12 Ultra High Resolution(4000x2500) Jigsaw Puzzles to choose from
  • Select your Puzzle Size from: 40, 160, 360 and 1000 pieces
  • Gallery to view completed puzzles.
  • Customize your space by selecting from a variety of different backgrounds
  • Unwind to casual music (featuring SKIP and LOOP controls)

* Achievements can be completed with or without "Hint Layer" enabled.

data.short_description: Complete Classic Jigsaw Puzzles featuring very raunchy depictions of Futanari. All puzzles are Ultra High Resolution and available in multiple sizes, up to 1000 pieces.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 荷蘭文, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2GHz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
